title: End To World Spawn
description: Exit the end to the world spawn.
body:
This mod makes all players that exit the end through the central island end portal return to the overworld world spawn.

This even affect players who have set their spawn points in the nether with a respawn anchor and in the end with a mod.

The player's spawn point does not change and respawn after death is not impacted at all

This mod is for Forge
